reviews.review_msg: If you're taking ENGL199W online, do NOT take it with them

I really enjoyed having her as a prof. She really emphasizes genre theory and analysis. This is NOT an introductory course so don't take this first year. There is a fair amount of writing in this course but she's very helpful and takes the time to go over things with you in class. Defs recommend her as an instructor!!

This prof made me hate english. She is super nice but cannot teach :S. She doesn't know what she wants from students and makes no sense most of the time. Class was dreadful to be in and she picks on students sometimes not me but you can tell when she doesn't like someone. Its funny to watch but so wrong!
Good prof, makes dry material relatively interesting with good examples.  Is VERY helpful if students don't understand the material.

She is really nice but she cannot teach! Everything about this class is horrible! I learned absolutely nothing and even if I did nothing from this class is transferable to school or real life! Worst class in the world!

The best advice I could ever give someone is don't take this class! She is really nice but if you are not an English enthusiast than this is not the class to take. Do not let the name deceive you, it should not be an introductory class!

The class is tough, especially if you're in first year. That being said, you do learn some new things; material can be a bit tedious at times. Sawatsky is fine though, she seems interested and will help you if need be.

She is a nice enough person and does the best she can teaching the MOST BORING MATERIAL IN THE WORLD!!! If you like 3 hours of talking about genre than this is the class for you! This is by far the worst class I have take and probably ever will!

Made course relevant, interesting, was fair, thorough, and a pleasant person. One can't slack on the readings because they can be complicated and involved. Participate with a positive open mind for you will enjoy the class and comprehend the info. Great prof. it has was a pleasure to participate in her class!

One of the BEST Profs this school has!  Challenges you while going above and beyond to help you succeed! She genuinly cares about each student, rare for an undergrad prof. She gives good marks but she inspires you to work for them. I worked harder in her class than I ever have before and I enjoyed every minute of it.
